summary: No obvious critical secret found, but hardening gaps were detected.

findings.title: Missing content-security-policy
findings.recommendation: Add a Content-Security-Policy to reduce data exfiltration and script injection impact.

findings.title: Missing x-frame-options
findings.recommendation: Add X-Frame-Options or frame-ancestors to reduce clickjacking risk.

findings.title: Missing referrer-policy
findings.recommendation: Add a strict Referrer-Policy to avoid leaking paths or tokens to third parties.

findings.title: Missing permissions-policy
findings.recommendation: Add a Permissions-Policy to disable unused browser capabilities.
